Created attachment 209989
cad/lepton-eda: update to 1.9.9

cad/lepton-eda: update to 1.9.9 + several upstream patches:
- fix the spice-sdb netlist backend (sub-circuit creation)
- fix log rotation (log directory has changed)
- improve tabbed GUI (reorderable tabs, active tab's context menu)
